# calendarChooserDidFinish(_:)

**Instance Method**

Sent when a user selects one or more calendars.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func calendarChooserDidFinish(_ calendarChooser: EKCalendarChooser)
```

## Parameters

- **calendarChooser**: The calendar chooser that sent this message.

## Selecting Calendars

- **calendarChooserSelectionDidChange(_:)**: Sent when a user changes the selection.
- **calendarChooserDidCancel(_:)**: Sent when the user cancels a calendar selection.
